title: National Industries
description: ***.in ***.com/c/national-industries/453107978 Established in 1976 in Ludhiana, National Industries is a premier automotive manufacturing enterprise and a core part of the esteemed Metalman Group. Specializing in precision-engineered components, the company supplies high-quality parts to top-tier two-wheeler brands, combining decades of expertise with modern manufacturing excellence. With a strong foundation in engineering innovation and award-winning workplace practices, National Industries continues to drive reliability and technological advancement in the automotive sector
